positive: Minimalist vector style illustration of a howling wolf against a stylized full moon and constellation map. The composition should be centered and balanced, using solid black silhouettes and accented by electric cyan and deep indigo geometric lines for the celestial elements. Clean, scalable graphic design suitable for apparel printing. Highly contrasted, flat art, negative space emphasized, symmetry, woodland spirit, mythical forest magic, retro sci-fi aesthetic.
